name: Miller Transportation Bus Svc
officers: Miller family (Emmett Miller Sr. founder; sons Tom and Emmett Jr.)
registry_source: Indiana INBiz Secretary of State (entity name: MILLER TRANSPORTATION BUS SERVICE INC). Direct INBiz entity number not retrieved via search; entity is active per third-party sources.
notes: Family-owned motorcoach company; business traces to 1937 (Emmett Miller Sr.), formally incorporated approximately 1977. Fleet per FMCSA: 190 power units / 240 drivers. Operates motorcoaches, school buses, shuttles, trolleys. Input address 4045 Park 65 Dr is a secondary/operations facility; FMCSA principal address is 1103 S Tibbs Ave.

name: East End Bus Svc LLC
officers: John Mensch (principal of related East End Bus Lines / Montauk entities)
registry_source: NY Department of State Division of Corporations (East End Bus Service, LLC listed). Direct DOS ID not retrieved (DOS public inquiry blocked by WAF). Related East End Bus Lines USDOT 2308602 is INACTIVE.
notes: No SAFER carrier record found under exact name 'East End Bus Service LLC' at the Holtsville address. East End Bus Service LLC filed Chapter 11 bankruptcy in EDNY (Case 8:18-bk-76717) in 2018 alongside affiliated East End Bus Lines, Montauk Student Transport, and Montauk Transit Service. East End ceased serving Long Island school districts by summer 2019; fleet liquidated. Related affiliate USDOT records (e.g., 2308602 East End Bus Lines) are INACTIVE in SAFER. Likely defunct.

name: Leahy's Bus Svc Inc
fmcsa_address: Philadelphia, PA (FMCSA record inactive; previously 172 Grape St / 2747 Salmon St area)
registry_source: Pennsylvania Department of State Bureau of Corporations (file.dos.pa.gov). Direct entity filing not retrievable via WebFetch (403 forbidden). Company contracted with School District of Philadelphia historically.
notes: USDOT 268292 / MC 179561 confirmed for LEAHY'S BUS SERVICE INC, Philadelphia, PA. SAFER record is INACTIVE. Company experienced bankruptcy and lost School District of Philadelphia contract in 2015 (had ~52 routes, ~100 buses pre-collapse). State police safety violations in Sept 2015. Now defunct/non-operational. Note: separate entity 'Leahy Transportation' (USDOT 2275792) at 2724 E Somerset St remains; distinct from this carrier.

name: Powder River Transportation
registry_source: Wyoming Secretary of State Business Division (wyobiz.wyo.gov) - POWDER RIVER TRANSPORTATION SERVICES INC, active and current with filings.
notes: Legal name: POWDER RIVER TRANSPORTATION SERVICES INC, DBA Coach USA. USDOT authority dated 6/1/1974 (proxy for founding). Acquired by Coach USA Dec 1996. Per 2024 news, Wynne Transportation acquired Powder River and Butler Motor Transit shop following Coach USA bankruptcy. Fleet of 52 buses; 2.44M miles in 2023. No crashes/inspections/OOS in 24-month period preceding 06/03/2026 report.

name: Bowen's Bus Svc Inc
officers: Jeff Bowen and Wendy Bowen (owners since 1996); founded by Andy and Ann Bowen (1957 origin)
registry_source: Wisconsin DFI (Department of Financial Institutions) Corporations Bureau - BOWEN'S BUS SERVICE, INC. Direct DFI entity ID not retrieved (search hit was unrelated record).
notes: Operations began 1957 (Andy & Ann Bowen, station wagon to Newbold school); first new bus 1962; incorporated 1974 as Bowen's Bus Service, Inc. Son Jeff and wife Wendy purchased business 1996. Became sole contractor for Rhinelander School District in 2009, expanding from 12 to 39 routes. Mailing address PO Box 43 McNaughton, WI 54543; physical principal per FMCSA is 1940 River St, Rhinelander, WI 54501. Input McNaughton address aligns (mailing). 47 power units / 34 drivers per SAFER.
